objects.prompt: "Asset design: 128x128 pixel art. A perfectly flat 2D graphic marking on the floor. Absolutely NO side-faces, NO 3D cylinder depth, NO thickness. It must look like a flat circle painted directly on the ground, 0-pixel elevation. Like a flat UI decal or a graffiti stencil seen from a 90-degree perfectly vertical top-down angle. Cyberpunk Tokyo style, vibrant neon cyan circuit patterns, clean pixel outlines. Isolated on a neutral background."
